allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); dev=p.get\(''''devDependencies'''',{}\); deps=p.get\(''''dependencies'''',{}\); print\(''''openapi-ts:'''', dev.get\(''''@hey-api/openapi-ts'''',''''?''''\) or deps.get\(''''@hey-api/openapi-ts'''',''''?''''\)\); print\(''''supabase/ssr:'''', deps.get\(''''@supabase/ssr'''',''''?''''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''installed version:'''', p.get\(''''version'''',''''?''''\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total: {data[""total""]}, Passed: {data[""passed""]}, Failed: {data[""failed""]}, Warned: {data[""warned""]}, Verdict: {data[""verdict""]}''''\); [print\(f''''  FAIL [{r[""source""]}→{r[""target""]}]: {r[""detail""][:100]}''''\) for r in data[''''interfaces''''] if r[''''status'''']==''''FAIL'''']")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,''''→'''',v[''''status'''']\) for k,v in s[''''nodes''''].items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k, v[''''status'''']\) for k,v in s[''''nodes''''].items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys; data=sys.stdin.read\(\); import json; obj=json.loads\(data\); [print\(s[''''name'''']+'''':'''', s.get\(''''output'''',''''''''\)[:3000]\) for s in obj.get\(''''steps'''',[]\) if s.get\(''''status''''\)==''''fail'''']")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys; data=sys.stdin.read\(\); import json; obj=json.loads\(data\); [print\(s[''''name'''']+'''':\\n''''+s.get\(''''output'''',''''''''\)[-5000:]\) for s in obj.get\(''''steps'''',[]\) if s.get\(''''status''''\)==''''fail'''']")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); nodes=s.get\(''''nodes'''',{}\); [print\(f''''{k}: {v.get\(""status""\)} \(prev: {v.get\(""previous_status""\)}\)''''\) for k,v in nodes.items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, yaml; data=yaml.safe_load\(sys.stdin\); agents=[''''sweep-adversary'''',''''sweep-contractualist'''',''''sweep-pathfinder'''',''''sweep-structuralist'''',''''sweep-skeptic'''']; [print\(f''''{a}: {[s[name] for s in data[assignments].get\(a,[]\)]}''''\) for a in agents]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''sweep_state.current_phase:'''', d.get\(''''sweep_state'''',{}\).get\(''''current_phase''''\)\); print\(''''sweep_state.operation:'''', d.get\(''''sweep_state'''',{}\).get\(''''operation''''\)\); print\(''''active_node:'''', d.get\(''''active_node''''\)\); print\(''''findings_pending:'''', len\(d.get\(''''sweep_state'''',{}\).get\(''''findings'''',{}\).get\(''''pending'''',[]\)\)\);  print\(''''pass_number:'''', d.get\(''''sweep_state'''',{}\).get\(''''pass_number''''\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''verdict:'''', d[''''verdict'''']\); print\(''''total:'''', d[''''total'''']\); print\(''''warned:'''', d[''''warned'''']\); print\(''''failed:'''', d[''''failed'''']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ss=d.get\(''''sweep_state'''',{}\); print\(''''current_phase:'''', ss.get\(''''current_phase''''\)\); print\(''''fixing_node:'''', ss.get\(''''fixing_node''''\)\); print\(''''active_node:'''', d.get\(''''active_node''''\)\)")
